ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the primary contact of the tenant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tenant account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tenant account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tenant account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Linux, firewall, router) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the device was seen on the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the log data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that generated the log data */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was generated */,
  "facility" TEXT /* Facility that generated the log (e.g., user, system) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the log entry */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the log entry */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the log entry */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the log entry */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the log entry (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string, if applicable */,
  "http_status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code, if applicable */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID, if applicable */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., firewall, intrusion detection system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, security analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security policy */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the security policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the security policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the policy is active */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_policies_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the security event */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security policy that triggered the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., intrusion detection, malware detection) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the event */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the event */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the event */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the event */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the event (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., firewall, intrusion detection system) */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the event (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES security_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_response" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident response */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the incident response */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security event that triggered the incident response */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident response occurred */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident response */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the response */,
  "response_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., resolved, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_response_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_response_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES security_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_retention_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data retention policy */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the data retention policy */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Retention period for log data (e.g., 30 days, 1 year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data retention policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the retention policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the retention policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the retention policy is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_retention_policies_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_retention" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log entry */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tenant that owns the log entry */,
  "retention_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data retention policy that applies to the log entry */,
  "retention_date" TEXT /* Retention date for the log entry */,
  "purge_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry should be purged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_retention_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("retention_policy_id") REFERENCES data_retention_policies ("policy_id")
)
